mechanism_narrative: Sustained increases in the federal funds rate raise the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rate-hike periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market exceeding a 0.3 percentage point monthly increase over three months signals impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off positioning that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 52% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in housing starts and revolving consumer credit indicates robust aggregate demand, which expands corporate profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 55% of observations, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production index below 105.0 indicates severe supply-side bottlenecks that compress corporate margins and trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when INDPRO breaches the threshold, or the signal's predictive power vanishes when controlling for FEDFUNDS changes in a rolling 12-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP expands corporate revenue bases, which translates directly into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as earnings expectations are revised upward.
failure_condition: The sign of GDPC1 growth fails to predict the sign of 5-day forward SPX returns in more than 55% of observations over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms a self-reinforcing labor market expansion, which sustains consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in over 50% of cases, or the cross-product term loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) across three consecutive rolling quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation acceleration exceeding 0.4% forces monetary authorities to maintain restrictive policy stances, which elevates equity risk premiums and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive despite sustained monthly inflation spikes above the threshold, or the signal's information coefficient drops below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in housing construction and industrial output signals synchronized sectoral expansion, which amplifies aggregate demand and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint threshold breach results in negative forward returns in more than 55% of instances, or the signal's directional accuracy fails to exceed 53% in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.
